title: Naukri.com Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Naukri.com Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Naukri.com Capital India has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Naukri.com Capital India:
Naukri.com Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com Capital India!
